name: Data Retention V1 Lean
description: 12-hour scheduled cleanup with bounded deletes, stale circuit safety valve, table size and index bloat monitoring, schema presence check, ANALYZE pass, quiet-by-default reporting with delivery-aware weekly timer, and delivery-independent retention_completed logging. No write-only cache — all error outputs terminal.

parameters.query:
WITH del_events AS (
  DELETE FROM supervisor_events
  WHERE id IN (
    SELECT id FROM supervisor_events
    WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
    LIMIT 1000
  )
  RETURNING id
),
stale_circuit AS (
  UPDATE circuit_state
  SET status = 'closed', error_count = 0, updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE circuit_key = 'supervisor'
    AND status = 'open'
    AND last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
    AND opened_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
  RETURNING circuit_key
)
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM del_events) AS deleted_events_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM stale_circuit) AS stale_circuit_reset,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supervisor_events) AS total_events,
  (SELECT pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size('supervisor_events'))) AS events_table_size,
  (SELECT pg_total_relation_size('supervisor_events')) AS events_table_size_bytes,
  (SELECT pg_size_pretty(pg_indexes_size('supervisor_events'))) AS events_index_size,
  (SELECT pg_indexes_size('supervisor_events')) AS events_index_size_bytes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schema_versions WHERE version = 'v1_lean') AS schema_version_present,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name IN ('circuit_state', 'supervisor_events', 'schema_versions')) AS expected_tables_found

INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, severity, status, payload)
VALUES (
  'retention-' || EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INTEGER,
  'retention_completed',
  'Data Retention',
  'retention',
  CASE WHEN ($1::jsonb)->>'hasWarnings' = 'true' THEN 'warning' ELSE 'info' END,
  CASE WHEN ($1::jsonb)->>'hasWarnings' = 'true' THEN 'completed_with_warnings' ELSE 'completed' END,
  $1::jsonb
)

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ hasWarnings: String($json.isDbError || !$json.analyzeOk || !$json.schemaOk || $json.isLimitHit || $json.staleCircuitReset || $json.tableSizeWarning || $json.indexBloatWarning), deleted_events: $json.deletedEvents, total_events: $json.totalEvents, events_table_size: $json.eventsTableSize, events_index_size: $json.eventsIndexSize, stale_circuit_reset: String($json.staleCircuitReset), limit_hit: String($json.isLimitHit), schema_ok: String($json.schemaOk), schema_version_present: String($json.schemaVersionPresent), expected_tables_found: $json.expectedTablesFound, analyze_ok: String($json.analyzeOk), table_size_warning: String($json.tableSizeWarning), index_bloat_warning: String($json.indexBloatWarning), notify_reason: $json.notifyReason, notified: String($json.shouldNotify) }) }}

parameters.content:
## 🧹 Data Retention V1 Lean (Final Build)
**Every 12h: Cleanup → Evaluate → Analyze → Notify? → Log → Done**

**9 executable nodes. 114 approved changes across 10 review cycles.**

- Bounded delete: 90 days, LIMIT 1000
- Stale circuit safety valve: auto-reset open circuits >1 hour
- Table size monitoring with 50MB threshold
- Index bloat detection with 50MB threshold (pg_indexes_size)
- Schema check: v1_lean version + 3/3 expected tables
- ANALYZE for query planner freshness
- Quiet by default: only notifies on DB error, schema drift,
  limit hit, stale circuit reset, table/index size warning,
  or weekly summary
- Weekly timer only advances after confirmed Telegram delivery
  (checks message_id via cross-node reference)
- retention_completed logged on ALL paths (silent and notified)
- Single authoritative timestamp from Check Analyze Result
- Entity-safe truncation + Telegram message clamp
- Manila timezone formatting
- Silent notifications (disable_notification: true)
- No write-only cache node (removed — dead data)
- All error outputs terminal (onError: continueErrorOutput)
- Single-JSON-parameter INSERT (immune to comma-split)
